title: hw3_convos: ouroboros and tooling notes
content:
## HW3 Tooling Notes

### Ouroboros
- Previously installed for HW2 from https://github.com/Q00/ouroboros
- Initiation command: `ooo interview "description"` for Socratic questioning
- `ooo auto` for goal → seed → execution with bounded loops
- `ooo run seed.yaml` for Double Diamond decomposition
- `ooo setup` to register runtime & configure project
- User asked about ouroboros for HW3 but ultimately used the manual 3-agent workflow instead

### AI workflow approach for HW3
- Did NOT use ouroboros for HW3; used a manual 3-agent Claude conversation workflow instead
- Agent 1 (Product Architect), Agent 2 (Compliance Reviewer), Agent 3 (QA Evaluator)
- Each phase was a separate prompt in the same conversation
- Agent 3 never edits — review-only; Agent 2 has veto on security/privacy
- This manual approach gave more control over the spec quality than automated tooling

### Key lesson
- For specification-only homework (no code), the manual multi-agent conversation workflow was more effective than automated tooling because each phase's output could be reviewed and approved before proceeding
